official_site_search_notes: Official Ashby posting found directly for Wellth Senior Health Informatics Data Analyst; search result crawled within the last two weeks and page is live.
validation_notes: Rejected 2026-04-30: official Ashby page appears live, but no true posting date was exposed; search-result crawl freshness is not accepted as proof that the job was posted within 60 days.
job_description:
# Senior Health Informatics Data Analyst
Company: Wellth
Source: Official company posting via Ashby
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/wellth/bbd75ba0-95e7-4831-acea-0ad2b409fbf7?locationId=8cde2473-456b-459f-9300-67e15f8d9959

## Highlights
- Remote senior health informatics data analyst role at a digital health company focused on Medicare and Medicaid populations.
- Uses behavioral economics, habit science, and healthcare data to improve outcomes for chronic-condition populations.
- Data Engineering & Analytics department with likely health outcomes, engagement, and analytics responsibilities.
strengths: Strong healthcare, Medicare/Medicaid, health outcomes, analytics, and data quality alignment.
Remote full-time role with data engineering/analytics function.
Healthcare populations and outcomes themes align with payer and member data experience.
gaps: Health informatics may require clinical terminology or informatics depth not explicit in the base resume.
Posting excerpt does not expose exact SQL/BI requirements; verify stack before applying.
notes: Apply first/if time. Tailor toward Medicare/Medicaid analytics, health outcomes reporting, SQL data quality, and stakeholder-ready insights.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Health Informatics Data Analyst | Medicare & Medicaid Analytics | SQL Data Quality
